title: Test: Add visual regression testing
original_text: Added visual regression testing with Percy. Implemented visual tests for all UI components. Added visual tests for responsive layouts. Implemented visual test diffing and approval. Added visual test reporting. Result: visual regression tests pass.
expected_subject: test(ui): add visual regression testing with Percy
expected_body_lines: - Implement visual tests for all UI components
- Add visual tests for responsive layouts
- Implement visual test diffing and approval
expected_command: git commit -m "test(ui): add visual regression testing with Percy"
